body.title: [sprint] igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py makes DIRECT provider calls — violates Inference-Proxy-only
body.description:
**Problem:** Surfaced during T-absorb-architecture-intent-points (2026-06-28). `unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py` still makes DIRECT provider calls (OllamaReasoner/OpenRouterReasoner, OPENROUTER_* env, raw urllib) — bypassing the canonical Inference Proxy device (`devices/inference/`). This violates the standing 'ALL inference through the Proxy' rule ([[feedback_inference_proxy_only]]): direct OR/Anthropic calls are exactly what the Proxy exists to centralize (routing, budget ledger, provider health, model registry). The inference architecture intent-point was deliberately re-homed onto the Proxy with this gateway's t1-t6 tier ladder marked historical.
**Proposed shape:** Route igor's inference through the Proxy device's capability_graph/rules_engine instead of direct providers. Preserve igor's cascade/skip_to semantics by mapping them onto Proxy tiers. Remove the direct OllamaReasoner/OpenRouterReasoner/urllib provider calls + OPENROUTER_* env reads from the gateway.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py (+ its reasoner imports); cross-check unseen_university/devices/inference/ entry surface.
**Design rules:** Inference-Proxy-only ([[feedback_inference_proxy_only]]); no direct OR/Anthropic imports; flag-direct-provider-calls.
**Scope boundary:** IN — repoint igor inference_gateway through the Proxy; remove its direct provider calls. OUT — Proxy device internals; other devices' inference paths (audit separately).
**Test plan:** (1) grep igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py for direct provider/urllib/OPENROUTER_ -> 0 after fix. (2) An igor inference call routes through the Proxy (assert Proxy ledger/health sees the request, or the gateway imports the Proxy client not a raw reasoner). (3) igor cascade skip_to semantics preserved (behavioral).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
